title: Wano Celebrates Liberation
description: On pages 38–40, this part focuses on Unknown person #37, Unknown person #38, Unknown person #39 as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Yeeek!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Again?! UGA, that idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: trouble, guys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Some- body stop the sous- chef!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Guh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Nnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnnng...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: few!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stand around shuffling your feet and I'll skin the lot of ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Hey! Why aren't you cooking, huh?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We would be if you hadn't started a brawl, squid fer brains!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just you wait! We're gonna kick yer butt one day, you lousy cook!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it me or is Sanji weirdly on edge these days?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it ain't you. He's been this way for a while.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He just got promoted to sous- chef too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's his prob- Lem? I don't get it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FEH! Who gets what that solid for brains thinks?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Don't bother trying.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: The all blue?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wow! It has all the fish from the four seas?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: i wanna go there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Someday...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: ...Once I'm finally out of here...
